english: I woke up early today and drank my coffee.
I went to work in the morning and came back in the evening.
It was a tiring but good day.
My brother works in America and we see him a lot.

arabic: مامتي بتحكي معي كل يوم عالتلفون.
transliteration: Māmti bt-ḥki maʕi kull yōm ʕal-telefōn.
english: My mom talks with me every day on the phone.
I'm very happy today, I swear!

arabic: اشتقتلك كتير والله، مين زمان ما شفتك.
transliteration: Ishtaʔtillak ktīr wallah, mīn zamān mā shuftak.
english: I missed you so much, haven't seen you in ages.

arabic: ما في وقت، أنا مضغوط كتير هلق.
transliteration: Mā fī waʔt, ana maḍghūṭ ktīr hallaʔ.
english: There's no time, I'm very stressed right now.
